creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
update libavformat/avidec.c to avoid a crash in inigo, the mlt renderer used by multimedia/kdenlive

Fix: here's the patch to be put in files/ (it has been taken from a new svn version of ffmpeg, so it's code made in ffmpeg and just works)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: import a clip in kdenlive and sometimes this will result in a segmentation fault
